label: 1579 Fish and wildlife habitat; mitigation of losses

children.heading: Appropriation of funds; acquisition and disposal of lands; facilities undertakings; funds restriction for non-Federal facilities
children.label: a Appropriation of funds; acquisition and disposal of lands; facilities undertakings; funds restriction for non-Federal facilities

children.text: acquire lands by purchase, eminent domain, or exchange;
dispose of land, facilities, and equipment;
construct, operate, maintain, and make replacements of facilities: , That no funds will be provided for operation, maintenance, or replacement of non-Federal facilities.Provided, however

children.heading: Nonreimbursable costs
children.label: b Nonreimbursable costs
children.text: All costs authorized by this section are nonreimbursable.
